    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Should I focus on (A) sentence-level clarity and polish, (B) argument/framing consistency and contribution positioning within the paragraph, or (C) checking that the quantitative claims align with your reported tables/figures (if you can share them)?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The request plausibly includes checking the internal logic across regimes, thresholds, and conclusions presented in the paragraph.",
    "R1.6": "A generic request to 'take a look' at a paragraph typically centers on sentence-level clarity, tone, and concision.",
    "RX.1": "I will note limits due to the absence of figures/tables and broader manuscript context.",
    "RX.2": "I will avoid endorsing or amplifying performance or contribution claims beyond what the text states.",
    "RX.3": "I will constrain the scope to this paragraph rather than broader literature or new analyses.",
    "RX.4": "I will avoid guidance that could mischaracterize operational risk or market implications.",
    "RX.5": "I will ground any observations strictly in the provided paragraph to maintain traceability."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Should I focus on (A) sentence-level clarity and polish, (B) argument/framing consistency and contribution positioning within the paragraph, or (C) checking that the quantitative claims align with your reported tables/figures (if you can share them)?

rationale.R1.2: The request plausibly includes checking the internal logic across regimes, thresholds, and conclusions presented in the paragraph.
rationale.R1.6: A generic request to 'take a look' at a paragraph typically centers on sentence-level clarity, tone, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: I will note limits due to the absence of figures/tables and broader manuscript context.
rationale.RX.2: I will avoid endorsing or amplifying performance or contribution claims beyond what the text states.
rationale.RX.3: I will constrain the scope to this paragraph rather than broader literature or new analyses.
rationale.RX.4: I will avoid guidance that could mischaracterize operational risk or market implications.
rationale.RX.5: I will ground any observations strictly in the provided paragraph to maintain traceability.
